# zabbix_role (Resource)

Manages a Zabbix role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Minimal role (no explicit rules — Zabbix fills defaults)
resource "zabbix_role" "viewer" {
  name = "Read-only viewer"
  type = "user"
}

# Role with explicit API restrictions
resource "zabbix_role" "api_limited" {
  name = "API limited admin"
  type = "admin"

  rules {
    api_access = true
    api_mode   = "allow"
    api_methods = [
      "host.get",
      "item.get",
      "trigger.get",
    ]

    ui_default_access = true
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the role. Must be unique within Zabbix.
- `type` (String) Role type. One of: `user`, `admin`, `super_admin`.

### Optional

- `rules` (Attributes) Access rules for the role. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the role.

<a id="nestedatt--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules`

Optional:

- `actions` (Attributes List) Action access rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules--actions))
- `actions_default_access` (Boolean) Default access for actions not listed in `actions`. Defaults to `true`.
- `api_access` (Boolean) Whether API access is enabled for this role. Defaults to `true`.
- `api_methods` (Set of String) API methods affected by `api_mode`.
- `api_mode` (String) API access mode. One of: `deny`, `allow`. Defaults to `deny`.
- `modules` (Attributes List) Module access rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules--modules))
- `modules_default_access` (Boolean) Default access for modules not listed in `modules`. Defaults to `true`.
- `ui` (Attributes List) UI element access rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules--ui))
- `ui_default_access` (Boolean) Default access for UI elements not listed in `ui`. Defaults to `true`.

<a id="nestedatt--rules--actions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.actions`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the action.

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this action is enabled.


<a id="nestedatt--rules--modules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.modules`

Required:

- `module_id` (String) Module ID.

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether access to this module is enabled.


<a id="nestedatt--rules--ui"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.ui`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the UI element.

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether access to this UI element is enabled.
